content: FastAPI BackgroundTasks execute after response returns, in same process. Declare BackgroundTasks parameter, add tasks with add_task(fn, *args). Works with dependency injection - merged across dependency tree. For heavy computation needing separate workers, use Celery/similar. Background tasks share memory with app, good for notifications, light processing, logging. For long-running pipeline triggers, background tasks start the job but pipeline orchestration (Dagster) handles actual execution.
